variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol2_packet_handler.ERRNUM_RESULT_FAIL
documentation: Failed to process the instruction packet.

variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol2_packet_handler.ERRBIT_ALERT

variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol1_packet_handler.ERRBIT_VOLTAGE
documentation: Supplied voltage is out of the range (operating volatage set in the control table)

variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol1_packet_handler.ERRBIT_ANGLE
documentation: Goal position is written out of the range (from CW angle limit to CCW angle limit)

variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol1_packet_handler.ERRBIT_OVERHEAT
documentation: Temperature is out of the range (operating temperature set in the control table)

variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol1_packet_handler.ERRBIT_RANGE
documentation: Command(setting value) is out of the range for use.

variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol1_packet_handler.ERRBIT_OVERLOAD
documentation: The current load cannot be controlled by the set torque.

variables.name: dynamixel_sdk.protocol1_packet_handler.ERRBIT_INSTRUCTION
documentation: Undefined instruction or delivering the action command without the reg_write command.
